account_name.label: Account Name
account_name.description: You can get your Account Name via Insider Inone Panel > Settings > Inone Settings > Account Preferences.

ucd_key.label: API Key
ucd_key.description: You can get your API Key via Insider Inone Panel > Settings > Preferences > Integration Settings

updateUserProfile.title: Create or Update a User Profile
updateUserProfile.description: Action used to update a User's attribute in Insider InOne.

email_as_identifier.label: Treat Email as Identifier
email_as_identifier.description: If true, Email will be sent as identifier to Insider.

phone_number_as_identifier.label: Treat Phone Number as Identifier
phone_number_as_identifier.description: If true, Phone Number will be sent as identifier to Insider

append_arrays.label: Append Array Fields
append_arrays.description: If enabled, new data for array fields will be appended to the existing values in Insider.

phone.label: Phone Number
phone.description: User's phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +6598765432), can be used as an identifier.

uuid.label: UUID
uuid.description: User's unique identifier. The UUID string is used as identifier when sending data to Insider. UUID is required if the Anonymous Id field is empty.

segment_anonymous_id.label: Anonymous Id
segment_anonymous_id.description: An Anonymous Identifier. The Anonymous Id string is used as identifier when sending data to Insider. Anonymous Id is required if the UUID field is empty.

custom_identifiers.label: Custom Identifiers
custom_identifiers.description: You can select you custom identifiers for the event.

email_as_identifier.label: Treat Email as Identifier
email_as_identifier.description: If true, Email will be sent as identifier to Insider.

phone_number_as_identifier.label: Treat Phone Number as Identifier
phone_number_as_identifier.description: If true, Phone Number will be sent as identifier to Insider

append_arrays.label: Append Array Fields
append_arrays.description: If enabled, new data for array fields will be appended to the existing values in Insider.

uuid.label: UUID
uuid.description: User's unique identifier. The UUID string is used as identifier when sending data to Insider. UUID is required if the Anonymous Id field is empty.

segment_anonymous_id.label: Anonymous Id
segment_anonymous_id.description: An Anonymous Identifier. The Anonymous Id string is used as identifier when sending data to Insider. Anonymous Id is required if the UUID field is empty.

custom_identifiers.label: Custom Identifiers
custom_identifiers.description: You can select your custom identifiers for the event.

parameters.label: Event Parameters
parameters.description: Event Parameters store information about an event.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Event. Currency used for product pricing, in ISO 4217 format (e.g. USD). Required field for Purchase and Cart Page Events.

product_id.label: Product Id
product_id.description: The product id associated with the product.

name.label: Product Name
name.description: Name of the product being viewed

unit_sale_price.label: Unit Sale Price
unit_sale_price.description: Sale Price ($) of the product being viewed. This is a numeric field. e.g. 9.90 for $9.90c.

unit_price.label: Unit Price
unit_price.description: Price ($) of the product being viewed. This is a numeric field. e.g. 9.90 for $9.90c.

event_group_id.label: Event Group ID
event_group_id.description: Event group ID. Required field for Purchase and Cart Page Events.

products.label: Products
products.description: Product details for the given event.

unit_sale_price.label: Unit Sale Price
unit_sale_price.description: Unit price of the product. Required field for Purchase and Cart Page Events.

attributes.label: User Properties
attributes.description: User Properties defines all the details about a user.

phone.label: Phone Number
phone.description: User's phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +6598765432), can be used as an identifier.

idfa.label: IDFA
idfa.description: IDFA used for Google and Facebook remarketing
